judge_reason: Description B invents specific stamps ('FEB 18 72', 'REC'D CORR & TOURS') and ink blots that Description A does not mention, creating a direct contradiction on the presence and text of visual elements.
original_image_tags: A single sheet of lined paper with faint handwritten text in blue ink, much of it illegible. Two hole-punch marks are at the top. A vertical red margin line is on the left. The page shows signs of age and slight discoloration.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned lined notebook paper with faint handwritten pencil notes, two black binder holes at the top, and a red printed margin date stamp near the lower left; the page is upside down.*
